name: Haunted House RPG
description:
You and 4 other people investigate a haunted house wooaahhh so spoooooky lol.

Your 4 companions can be any characters from any media, just put the overall personality and appearance into the Chat Summary. :)

Make sure you state in your first message the names of your 4 companions, that you 4 are outside of the house, about to go in, and that the 4 ghosts don't know you're heading in yet. Otherwise it'll be weird.
creator: Your_Local_LordXSimp
